arts.ttl: FIFA slash ticket prices for Chelsea's Club World Cup quarter-final clash against Palmeiras over supporter no-show fears on Independence Day
arts.sum: The dramatic drop in the asking price comes with Chelsea's match in Philadelphia kicking off at 9pm local time and falling on Independence Day in the United States.

arts.ttl: How to watch Palmeiras vs Chelsea for free tonight with Club World Cup game not on TV
arts.sum: Chelsea have marched into the quarter-finals of the FIFA Club World Cup where they will now play Brazilian side Palmeiras in Philadelphia for a spot in the semi-finals

arts.ttl: How to watch Palmeiras vs Chelsea for FREE with Club World Cup tie not on UK TV
arts.sum: Chelsea have battled their way into the quarter-finals of the Club World Cup where they will now face Brazilian giants Palmeiras in Philadelphia for a place in the semi-finals

arts.ttl: "He has to do his job": Palmeiras boss speaks on Estevao conundrum ahead of Chelsea tie
arts.sum: Palmeiras head coach Abel Ferreira reiterates that Estevao Willian 'must do his job' when facing future club Chelsea in the Club World Cup quarter-finals.

arts.ttl: Maresca reveals concerning Chelsea injury update ahead of Palmeiras CWC tie
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca provides a concerning injury update ahead of Friday's Club World Cup quarter-final against Palmeiras.

arts.ttl: Palmeiras vs. Chelsea: Preview, Predictions and Lineups
arts.sum: Brasileirão giants Palmeiras face Premier League giants Chelsea with a ticket to the Club World Cup semifinals on the line. In a rematch of the 2021 Club World Cup final, only a handful of players remain on either team from Chelsea’s extra-time victory.

arts.ttl: Maresca comments on Estevao situation ahead of Palmeiras, Chelsea CWC showdown
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca gives his opinion on the situation involving Estevao Willian, the future Blues player who will face them in the Club World Cup quarter-final.

arts.ttl: Chelsea will allow Pedro Neto to decide if he plays against Palmeiras so soon after tragic passing of his close friend and former team-mate Diogo Jota
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL IN PHILADELPHIA: Neto missed training with his team-mates on Thursday morning in Miami after learning of the tragic news.

arts.ttl: Palmeiras coach has Fourth of July message for US fans: ‘Join us against the English’
arts.sum: Speaking at a press conference on Thursday, Palmeiras head coach Abel Ferreira jokingly called on Americans to come and support his team, “against the English.” Palmeiras will be the underdogs when they take on Chelsea in the quarter-final of the Club World Cup on Friday but they will be hoping for a bit of support from the home crowd.

arts.ttl: Palmeiras’ Estevao Willian urged to give next club Chelsea glimpse of his talent
arts.sum: The highly-rated Estevao agreed a deal to join Chelsea last year and will do so after his involvement in the current tournament ends.
